item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Court Fee Waiver Modernization
item.description:
👀 Federal Court Fee Waiver Modernization

What

Federal court fee waiver (in forma pauperis) modernization in the 119th Congress.

What it does

  • Uniform IFP application across federal courts · cooperative-class member eligibility provisions · PACER access for IFP litigants · 28 U.S.C. § 1915 modernization.

Composes

Save-the-World Paper 10 (Universal Justice) · Rural Attorney Recruitment.

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
